title: SailPoint ISC Transform Schema - usernameGenerator
description: Strict schema derived from SailPoint official Username Generator operation documentation. This transform is intended for use within an account create profile; doc examples show the transform object embedded under a create profile attribute entry's 'transform' field and do not include a transform-level 'name'.

name.description: Optional. In general transform syntax, only the root-level transform has a name; nested transforms omit it.

attributes.description: Username generator configuration plus optional dynamic variables (per docs).

patterns.description: A JSON array of patterns for the generator to evaluate for uniqueness, in sequential order. Docs allow using 'uniqueCounter' as a reserved variable (shown as ${uniqueCounter} in examples). Docs also state that if a pattern contains uniqueCounter, it must be the last pattern.

sourceCheck.description: Whether the generator checks only the ISC database or queries the target system directly. true = check target system directly (only if the system supports getObject); false = check only the ISC database (default).

additionalProperties.description: Dynamic variable value used in patterns. Docs describe these as transforms.

NestedTransform.description: Nested transform object used as a dynamic variable (e.g., fn, ln, fi, mi). Docs examples for nested transforms typically omit 'name'.

attributes.description: Operation-specific attributes for the nested transform (may be omitted for operations without attributes).
